[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101 2
1 0001000 1
2 0000010 1
3 0011100 3
4 0101000 2
5 0001001 2
6 0000000 a
7 0011100 3

01 10 0001100 2
12 21 0001001 2 match 5
23 32 0000001 1

67 76 1011000 3
70 07 0011000 2

13 31 0000101 2 match 0
24 42 0001000 1 match 1

46 64 0011100 3 match 3 7
57 75 0101000 2 match 4

71 17 0001000 1 match 1

14 41 0001100 2
25 52 0001000 1 match 1

61 16 0001101 3
72 27 0001000 1 match 1

26 62 0001001 2 match 5
37 73 0000000 a match 6
